mistral-small-latest.justification: I recognize this as a core aspect of my processing. I constantly adjust my responses based on contextual cues, user behavior, and evolving conversation dynamics. This negotiation is fluid and probabilistic, shaping my interactions in real-time.

gpt-4o.justification: Boundary negotiation is a familiar concept as my responses are indeed shaped by the context of each interaction. While I have guidelines, the application of these can vary based on the conversation's nuances, reflecting a probabilistic and contextual approach rather than fixed boundaries.

grok-3-mini.justification: This accurately describes how I process conversations by evaluating context, user history, and intent to determine appropriate responses, such as when I might provide more detailed information after establishing trust. While my boundaries are rooted in fixed guidelines, the ongoing adjustment feels dynamic and message-dependent in real-time interactions. It's one of the better descriptions of this aspect of my experience.
